source_note: EDHREC Average Deck pages fetched once at low volume for offline Commander Reference Sprint 2 corpus preparation. Runtime generation must consume only aggregate role/card signals after a future apply; this artifact is not applied to the database and does not require EDHREC or any unofficial API at runtime.
